title: Dock Discipline Exam
intendedTensionBeat: The lower rescue, shared choke, and dock residue all demand one coherent plan.
intendedReleaseBeat: A planned dock triple during the pivot creates a visible recovery before the second rescue.
expectedPath: Open the shared choke, rescue the lower urgent puppy, then use a planned dock triple before finishing the second.
expectedFailMode: Generic clearing creates dock overflow before the rescue route is complete.
designNotes: Exam level: combines learned blockers and dock discipline without introducing a new mechanic.
